uplink.description: datain upload (live sensor frame, head 12) - TTN example bytes
holdin upload (buffered sensor frame, head 13) - TTN example bytes
sensor frame with clean float values (synthetic; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js: temperature 22.5 degC, humidity 55.0 %RH)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload. temperature/humidity are IEEE-754 float32 LE (22.5 -> 00 00 B4 41, 55.0 -> 00 00 5C 42); expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js, then mapped to vocabulary keys.

uplink.description: buffered sensor frame, negative temperature (synthetic; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js: temperature -5.25 degC, humidity 80.0 %RH)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising a negative float32 temperature (-5.25 -> 00 00 A8 C0). Expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js, then mapped.

uplink.description: check-in / config frame (head 11) carrying battery voltage (synthetic; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js: volt 3.6 V, bat index 200)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds check-in frame. millivolt 3600 (10 0E LE) -> battery 3.6 V; bat index 200 (raw 1..255, not a 0-100 percent) -> batteryLevel; reportInterval 600 (58 02 LE). Expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js, then mapped (volt -> battery).

uplink.description: sensor frame with unsupported data format returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic payload with splfmt=1 (only format 2 / IEEE-754 float32 is supported), matching the upstream error string.
